extensionDescription.message: Translate and save selected foreign-language text while reading the web.

settingsPageDescription.message: Manage your reading preferences and AI service connection.

settingsReadingDescription.message: Control what LinguaLens shows when you select text.

settingsProviderDescription.message: Configure an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, credentials, and model.

settingsExplanationLanguageDescription.message: The language used for translations and explanations.

settingsApiKeyDescription.message: Your API key is stored only in this browser.

settingsWordLookupDescription.message: Show the translation panel after you select text.

settingsPronunciationLookupDescription.message: Include a pronunciation when the source language supports one.

settingsPronunciationPreferencesDescript.message: Edit the source-language and pronunciation-notation pairs sent to the AI. Disabled rows are not sent.

settingsPronunciationEmpty.message: No pronunciation notation preferences. Add a row to configure one.

settingsPronunciationRowsInvalid.message: Every row needs a unique language and a pronunciation notation.

settingsPronunciationRestoreConfirm.message: Restore the default pronunciation notation preferences? Your current rows will be replaced.

settingsProviderUsageNote.message: Selected text and available sentence context are sent to the configured LLM provider and may consume your API quota.

savedPageDescription.message: Review the words and sentences you have collected while reading.

emptySavedHint.message: Add an API key, then select text on a web page to translate and save it.

modelNoModelsReturned.message: The provider did not return any available models.

modelApiKeyRequired.message: Please add your LLM API key before loading models.

modelBaseUrlRequired.message: Please add a provider base URL before loading models.

translationApiKeyRequired.message: Please add your LLM API key in LinguaLens settings before translating.

translationBaseUrlRequired.message: Please add a provider base URL in LinguaLens settings before translating.

translationEmptyProviderResponse.message: The LLM provider returned an empty translation.
